name: Narasaki Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Narasaki Sangyo Co., Ltd. engages in the sale of electric machinery and equipment, and petroleum products to industry and households. It offers measuring and monitoring supervisory control equipment; air conditioning and sanitation equipment, freezing and refrigerating equipment, elevators, power receiving/transforming facilities, emergency home power generators, power supply systems, parking lot equipment, large-scale mapping devices, building management systems, and security systems; FA and high-performance materials; and industrial equipment and agricultural implements, as well as boat products, shipping materials, disaster prevention devices, and other products. The company also sells construction machinery and systems; construction materials; and energy equipment. In addition, it is involved in motor truck operations; shipping and transport operations; warehouse management; boat leasing; domestic coastal shipping; customs clearance; sea transport agency; air service agency; and gas station management activities. Further, the company sells automobile parts, liquefied petroleum gas, and other high-pressure gases; and repairs automobiles. The company was formerly known as Narasaki Sangyo Kaiun K.K. and changed its name to Narasaki Sangyo Co., Ltd. in 2002. Narasaki Sangyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1902 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
